mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunk ( kb_id, document_id, content, embedding, chunk_index, meta_json, enabled ) VALUES ( #{kbId}, #{documentId}, #{content}, #{embedding}::vector, #{chunkIndex}, #{metaJson}::jsonb, #{enabled} )

INSERT INTO document_chunk ( kb_id, document_id, content, embedding, chunk_index, meta_json, enabled ) VALUES
( #{c.kbId}, #{c.documentId}, #{c.content}, #{c.embedding}::vector, #{c.chunkIndex}, #{c.metaJson}::jsonb, #{c.enabled} )
